description_long: This is a male police officer with a bald head, wearing a light blue short-sleeve shirt and dark blue pants. Over his shirt, he dons a black tactical vest with the word 'SECURITY' emblazoned in yellow on the back and a yellow emblem on the front. He is holding a pink donut in his right hand, raised to his mouth as if about to take a bite. The officer is equipped with a utility belt that appears to hold a holstered item on his right hip. His footwear consists of sturdy, black boots, and his overall appearance suggests a relaxed, approachable demeanor typical of urban security personnel.
description: A bald male police officer in a blue uniform and black tactical vest, eating a pink donut and wearing a utility belt with black boots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's face, donut in hand, tactical vest with a yellow emblem, and utility belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the officer's profile, donut near his mouth, and the holstered item on his right hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'SECURITY' label on the vest and the back of the utility belt.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the officer's profile, donut in hand, and the side of the tactical vest.
attribute_uniform_type: Light blue short-sleeve shirt, dark blue pants, black tactical vest with yellow lettering, black utility belt, and black boots.
